meaning: adj.不(昏)暗的 不晦涩的 不隐匿的 清楚的
examples: Unobscured by the dust of history.
I do not believe that the Iks are representative of isolated, revealed man, unobscured by social habits.
"Because ALMA can see through all the dust, we get a pristine, unobscured view of the early universe, " said Richer.
